query:
SELECT rt.id, rt.code, rt.nameEn, rc.nameEn as category, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_sections WHERE typeId = rt.id) as sections_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_fields ff JOIN form_sections fs ON ff.sectionId = fs.id WHERE fs.typeId = rt.id) as fields_count
FROM request_types rt
JOIN request_categories rc ON rt.categoryId = rc.id
WHERE rt.code = 'ADMIN_VISIT' OR rt.nameEn LIKE '%Admin%';
